scripts.build:admin: node scripts/generate-static-data.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=production NEXT_CONFIG=admin next build
scripts.build:admin-server: node scripts/prepare-static-build.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=production ADMIN_MODE=true NEXT_CONFIG=admin next build && node scripts/restore-api-routes.js
scripts.build:vercel-admin: cross-env NODE_ENV=production NEXT_CONFIG=admin ADMIN_MODE=true next build
scripts.build:staging: node scripts/prepare-static-build.js && node scripts/generate-static-data.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=production NEXT_PUBLIC_ENVIRONMENT=staging next build && node scripts/restore-api-routes.js
scripts.build:production: node scripts/prepare-static-build.js && node scripts/generate-static-data.js && cross-env NODE_ENV=production NEXT_PUBLIC_ENVIRONMENT=production next build && node scripts/restore-api-routes.js
scripts.security:monitor: npm run security:check && npm run security:csp
